Hey! Noah here. I wanted to touch base with you about your property in Columbus. Have you considered letting it go?
Hi Jeffrey, are you the right person to ask about 709 Cherry Hollow Rd? -Jack with LHB
Hello Jeffrey, Jack w/ LHB here, and hoped to ask something related to 709 Cherry Hollow Rd.
Hi Jeffrey, have you thought about selling your place at 709 Cherry Hollow Rd? Let me know. -Jack
No
Not a problem at all. Do you think it could be for sale within the next 4 months?
No
Understood. Do you have anything or know someone who wants to maybe sell? I usually look for homes that need some work. I pay $1000 for referrals I close on.

guidelines:
(Ask about) 
Conditions
Asking price
Closing
motivation

messages.body: Hey Hongdong, noticed in the county records that you own 1917 Stockwell Dr. Got any plans with that? -Lisa with LHB.
Hi, this is Adam with LHB. Interested in exploring opportunities for 1917 Stockwell Dr? Let me know if you'd like to chat. Thanks!
Hi Hongdong, have you thought about selling your property at 1917 Stockwell Dr lately? Happy to chat if you're open to it. -Jack
No,
Not a problem at all. Do you think it could be for sale within the next 4 months?
We don't have plan
Understood. Do you have anything or know someone who wants to maybe sell? I usually look for homes that need some work. I pay $1000 for referrals I close on.

guidelines:

Closing

messages.body: Hi, this is Jack with LHB. I came across 9417 Avemore Ct and would love to discuss if you'd consider a potential deal.
Hello Thomas, I'd like to discuss your property at 9417 Avemore Ct. Curious about your plans. Jack-LHB
Hi Thomas, have you considered selling your property at 9417 Avemore Ct? Let me know. -Jack
Texting you regarding your property at 9417 Avemore Ct, do you have any plans to sell it soon or down the road?
